title: Delhi Heat Wave
lead: Delhi is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.77. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing a threat to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Delhi has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The city's temperature is expected to remain high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 12.2 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 41%, and the wind speed is 10.1 km/h, which may provide some relief but will not be enough to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Activate emergency response measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects immediately.
